projectName: National Grid Upgrade — M1 Corridor & Rugby-Coventry Spur
contractForm: NEC4 Option C (Target Cost with Activity Schedule)

liquidatedDamages.appliesFrom: the relevant Sectional Completion Date or overall Completion Date, whichever is later to be achieved for the affected section
liquidatedDamages.notes: Delay damages accrue per calendar day of delay beyond the applicable completion date, capped at 10% of the contract value in aggregate.

maintenancePeriod.startsAt: practical completion / handover of each section
maintenancePeriod.scope: Contractor remains responsible for scheduled maintenance, vegetation management along the corridor, and rectification of any defects notified by the Employer during this period at no additional cost.

retentionReleaseTerms: Half released at Sectional Completion, remaining half released at the end of the Defects Liability Period.

bonusForEarlyCompletion.notes: Payable for each calendar day the overall Completion Date is bettered, capped at 60 days.

penaltyClauses: Liquidated damages of GBP 15,000 per calendar day apply if a Sectional or the overall Completion Date is missed, capped at 10% of contract value.
Failure to maintain the agreed outage windows with the DNO for commissioning work may incur a separate rescheduling charge of GBP 25,000 per missed window.

Persistent non-conformance with environmental/ecology conditions attached to the wayleave consents may trigger a compliance notice and, if unresolved within 14 days, a GBP 5,000 per week penalty until resolved.
insuranceRequirements: Contractor to maintain Contractor's All Risks cover of GBP 200,000,000 and Public Liability cover of GBP 50,000,000 for the duration of the works and the Maintenance Period.
notes: All figures in this file are illustrative example data for a demo application and do not represent a real contract.
